title: Chinese Symbols: Copy & Paste 福 龍 Chinese Characters
meta_description: Copy and paste Chinese symbols with pinyin and meanings — lucky characters like 福 and 龍, love, nature, and strength hanzi. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Meaningful Chinese characters — luck, love, dragons, and nature — each labeled with pinyin and meaning. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Chinese symbols carry centuries of meaning in a single character, which is why hanzi like 福 (good fortune) and 龍 (dragon) appear in usernames, bios, tattoos, and Lunar New Year posts worldwide. This library collects culturally meaningful Chinese characters organized by theme, each labeled with its pinyin romanization and English meaning so you know exactly what you are copying. Use them to add depth to a profile, decorate a caption, or send an auspicious greeting.

sections.label: Lucky Characters
sections.intro: Auspicious characters traditionally displayed for good fortune, prosperity, and happiness.

sections.label: Love & Virtue
sections.intro: Characters expressing love, harmony, and the virtues prized in Chinese tradition.

sections.label: Nature & Elements
sections.intro: Animals of legend and the natural elements — favorites for aesthetic bios and usernames.

sections.label: Strength & Spirit
sections.intro: Bold characters for strength, courage, and destiny — popular in gamer tags and bold bios.

sections.label: Punctuation
sections.intro: Full-width punctuation and brackets from the CJK Symbols and Punctuation block.

collection_section.label: Character Sets
collection_section.intro: Copy a full themed set of Chinese characters — or a classic blessing phrase — with one click.
